name: mmx-dashboard
description: MagicMirror X Monitor dashboard module and sample configuration.

scripts.check: node --check config/config.xmonitor.js && node --check modules/MMM-XMonitor/MMM-XMonitor.js && node --check modules/MMM-XMonitor/node_helper.js && node --check scripts/electron-display-info.cjs && bash -n scripts/install-into-magicmirror.sh && bash -n scripts/start-xmonitor-dashboard.sh
